name: PUBottomTray
description: Persistent tray anchored to the bottom of the screen. Drags and snaps between a peeked state and an expanded state — no backdrop, always visible. Used over the Explore map to show nearby WiFi venues.

props.name: children
props.description: Tray body content (typically a list of rows)

props.name: dark
props.description: Dark surface — navy background, white text

props.name: peekHeight
props.description: Visible height in px when tray is in peeked (collapsed) state

props.name: expandHeight
props.description: Visible height in px when tray is fully expanded

behaviour.dragSnap: snaps to peek or expand positions based on velocity and midpoint threshold
behaviour.handle: 60×5px pill at top center, greyD (#DDDDDF) on light, rgba(255,255,255,0.15) on dark
